final_prompt.prompt:
Create a retro-futuristic sci-fi illustration of a 1960s vision of year 2000 lunar colony life.

Style/medium: 1960s-70s sci-fi magazine cover illustration, retro-futurism, vintage offset print with visible halftone dot texture, bold linework, slightly faded saturated colors, optimistic atomic-age aesthetic
Composition: wide establishing shot, slightly low angle looking up at the domed city, Earth positioned in upper right quadrant as focal anchor
Subject: massive transparent geodesic dome covering a miniature city with skyscrapers, green parks, monorail tracks, and flying vehicles inside
Scene/backdrop: barren gray lunar surface outside the dome, black starless void of space, Earth hanging in the distance showing blue oceans and white clouds
Lighting/mood: bright artificial lighting inside the dome contrasting with harsh lunar shadows outside, sense of wonder and naive optimism about the future
Color palette: saturated primary colors (teal, orange, yellow) with intentional fading/aging, cool gray lunar regolith, deep black space, vibrant blue-and-white Earth
Materials/textures: smooth reflective dome surface, printed halftone dot pattern throughout, crisp hard-edged illustration lines, matte paper texture
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, modern CGI aesthetic, 8K stuffer language, contemporary sci-fi grimdark tone, digital gradients without halftone texture
